title: Roster
description: Student roster stored in students/roster.yml within a PXL Classroom control repository.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v2 renames student_id→student_number and display_name→full_name, and adds email.

student_number.description: Institutional student number (e.g. PXL SIS ID). Stable across registrations.

email.description: Institutional email; optional but recommended for notifications.

class_group.description: Optional class group or section the student belongs to.

github_login.description: GitHub username. Null if not yet linked.

github_id.description: Immutable GitHub user ID. Null if not yet linked.

active.description: Whether the student is actively enrolled.
